tool_args.label: March YTD Total Revenue
tool_args.raw_text: Total revenue of $257.1 million was $12.6 million unfavorable to the budget.

tool_args.label: March YTD Ridership
tool_args.raw_text: Through March 2026, ridership was 18.9 million which was 4.8% above 2025 and 3.8% above the budget.

tool_args.label: March YTD Commutation Ridership
tool_args.raw_text: Commutation ridership of 8.0 million was 12.7% above 2025 and 9.7% above the budget.

tool_args.label: March YTD Non-Commutation Ridership
tool_args.raw_text: Non-Commutation ridership of 10.9 million was 0.4% below 2025 and 0.2% below the budget.

tool_args.label: March YTD Farebox Revenue
tool_args.raw_text: farebox revenue of $161.9 million was $4.9 million higher than the budget

tool_args.label: March YTD Total Expenses before non-cash liability adjustments
tool_args.raw_text: Total expenses before non-cash liability adjustments of $605.1 million were $31.3 million or 4.9% favorable to the budget.

tool_args.label: March YTD Total Headcount
tool_args.raw_text: Total headcount was 7,838, which was 198 positions lower than the budget.

tool_args.label: Non-Reimbursable Overtime Overspend
tool_args.raw_text: Overspend of $13.1M vs Adopted Budget primarily due to unfavorable Weather-Related Overtime and Unscheduled Maintenance, partially offset by lower Scheduled Service, Vacancy/Absentee Coverage, Programmatic/Routine Maintenance, and Unscheduled Service.

payload.claim_text: Non-Reimbursable Overtime overspend of $13.1M vs Adopted Budget primarily due to unfavorable Weather-Related Overtime and Unscheduled Maintenance, partially offset by lower Scheduled Service, Vacancy/Absentee Coverage, Programmatic/Routine Maintenance, and Unscheduled Service.

tool_args.label: Results based on preliminary close
tool_args.raw_text: Results are based on the preliminary close of the general ledger and are subject to review and adjustment. Please note that the current months' actuals do not include post-close adjustments, which will be captured in the subsequent month's YTD results.

tool_args.label: Overtime expenses unfavorable variance
tool_args.raw_text: Overtime expenses were $13.1 million unfavorable due to higher weather emergencies and unscheduled maintenance, partially offset by programmatic/routine maintenance, scheduled service, vacancy/absentee coverage, and unscheduled service.

payload.claim_text: Overtime expenses were $13.1 million unfavorable due to higher weather emergencies and unscheduled maintenance, partially offset by programmatic/routine maintenance, scheduled service, vacancy/absentee coverage, and unscheduled service.

tool_args.label: Adjusted Farebox Operating Ratio methodology
tool_args.raw_text: Adjusted Fare Box Operating Ratio and Cost Per Passenger indicators have been adjusted for comparability between the Long Island Rail Road and Metro-North Railroad and are being presented only at the railroad operating committees. These adjustments are not being used MTA-wide. Adjustments have been made to reflect all operating revenue and significant financial impacts that are outside management's control. These adjustments include: Inclusion of Other Operating Revenue, Removal of OPEB Current Payment expenses for retirees, and Removal of the UAAL associated with the LIRR's closed pension plan.

payload.claim_text: Adjusted Fare Box Operating Ratio and Cost Per Passenger indicators have been adjusted for comparability between the Long Island Rail Road and Metro-North Railroad and are being presented only at the railroad operating committees. These adjustments are not being used MTA-wide. Adjustments have been made to reflect all operating revenue and significant financial impacts that are outside management's control. These adjustments include: Inclusion of Other Operating Revenue, Removal of OPEB Current Payment expenses for retirees, and Removal of the UAAL associated with the LIRR's closed pension plan.
payload.subject: Adjusted Farebox Operating Ratio methodology

tool_args.label: YTD Materials & Supplies variance
tool_args.raw_text: Materials and Supplies were $21.0 million favorable primarily due to the timing of modification and RCM activity for revenue fleet and reclaimed pooled materials.

tool_args.label: YTD Electric Power variance
tool_args.raw_text: Electric Power expenses were $2.4M unfavorable primarily due to higher rates and higher consumption.

tool_args.label: YTD Fuel expense variance
tool_args.raw_text: Fuel expenses were $1.2 million unfavorable primarily due to higher rates, partially offset by lower consumption.

tool_args.label: YTD Pensions expense variance
tool_args.raw_text: Pensions expenses were $6.9 million unfavorable due to the timing of pension payments and the estimated percentage of pensions allocated to reimbursable was over-estimated.
